commands.review_summary:
The PR adds speech-core extension runtime wrapper entrypoints, updates bundled metadata/build packaging for those sidecars, and narrows send-side poll intent detection to question/option anchors with focused tests.

PR surface: Source -66, Tests +26, Other +8. Total -32 across 9 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level. Current main rejects send before dispatch when poll metadata trips hasPollCreationParams, and current main has packages/speech-core without the extensions/speech-core sidecars needed for dist/extensions runtime loading; I did not execute tests in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human follow-up is needed for real behavior proof and for deciding whether to consolidate the overlapping poll-intent PR; there is no narrow ClawSweeper code repair to queue from this review.
